headline: Is Dow Inc. (DOW) One of the Best Performing S&P 500 Stocks So Far in 2026
summary: Dow Inc. (NYSE:DOW) is one of the best performing S&P 500 stocks so far in 2026. On April 23, Dow reported Q1 2026 financial results, characterized by a 6% year-on-year decline in net sales to $9.8 billion. This drop was driven by a 7% decrease in local prices and a 2% dip in overall volume, […]

headline: US Has More Natural Gas Than It Can Use as War Chokes Global Supply
summary: (Bloomberg) -- As the Iran war strangles natural gas supplies, countries across Asia and Africa are rationing fuel and enduring blackouts.
